name: gaugewright-saml-verify
description: SAML SP verify sidecar (M3 ID-2): verify a SAML Response over stdin, emit {ok,subject,attributes} on stdout. Runs on the bundled bun/node runtime; correctness from @node-saml/node-saml (xml-crypto C14N+dsig). Keeps the Rust core OpenSSL-free.

gaugewright.dependencyPolicy: May depend on open-source app/identity contracts and SAML verifier libraries; must not depend on private managed-service infra.
